_comment: Triage of all 62 authored figures against the P0 operation set (point_projection, line_true_length, rabattement_plane). opKind names the handler a future IR would route to; 'authored' lists the sub-figure IRs that exist. Everything else degrades gracefully: the authored 2D SVG is shown, the 3D button simply does not appear. Re-derive nothing — this file IS the worklist.

figures.note: E61(a) — horizontal hinge through A. The flagship gold figure.
E61(b) frontal hinge in πV; (c) de-bout hinge drawn vertical. One sheet, two IRs.
E61(d) — projecting plane (H projections collinear); rabattement still applies.
E62 tetrahedron — solid; point lifting works but the operation is beyond P0.
E63 five-vertex solid.
E64 triangle OAB with plane traces.
E65 triangle OAB about ch^V (frontal hinge, O on the hinge). Authored; ~8.5px coplanarity residual surfaced as a chip (the redraw spreads A^V over ~10px).
E66 quadrilateral ABCD with centre O.
E67 regular hexagon in an oblique plane — best-looking candidate for the next IR.
E68 pyramid — solid.
E69 quadrilateral in a projecting plane.
E70 triangle + point S with true sizes.
